---
title: "HUMMR Input Builder — A Simple Web GUI for HUMMR"
date: 2025-12-11
description: "A lightweight, browser-based GUI for generating input files for the HUMMR quantum chemistry program."
categories: [HUMMR, Quantum Chemistry]
author: Gurjot Singh
---

I built a lightweight, browser-based GUI for generating input files for the **HUMMR** quantum chemistry program.
Instead of writing inputs manually, you can now configure all keywords through a clean interface and instantly preview the generated file.
The tool includes organized sections for all major HUMMR keywords.

[HUMMR Input Builder](https://hummr-input-builder.streamlit.app){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

It's fully [open source](https://github.com/GuriTheoChem/HUMMR-Input-Builder){target="_blank"} and deployed on Streamlit Cloud.

Links for HUMMR and its documentation:

[HUMMR Source Code](https://scm.cms.hu-berlin.de/hummr-dev-team/hummr){.btn .btn-outline-secondary target="_blank"} &nbsp;
[HUMMR User Guide](https://hummr-dev-team.pages.cms.hu-berlin.de/hummr/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary target="_blank"}
